zh.Borough Green, Kent, England: 英國肯特波洛 格林
zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Ingoldesthorpe於大約1441年出生在英國肯特波洛 格林時，她的父親Edmond Ingelthorpe33歲，母親Lady Joyce Tibetot12歲。她於1457年4月25日與Sir John Neville在英國肯特坎特布瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年5月20日在英國英格蘭波克夏比善姆享年36歲，埋葬在英國波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.Borough Green, Kent, England: 英国肯特波洛 格林
zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Ingoldesthorpe于大约1441年出生在英国肯特波洛 格林时，她的父亲Edmond Ingelthorpe33岁，母亲Lady Joyce Tibetot12岁。她于1457年4月25日与Sir John Neville在英国肯特坎特布瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年5月20日在英国英格兰波克夏比善姆享年36岁，埋葬在英国波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Ingoldesthorpe was born about 1441, in Borough Green, Kent, England, her father, Edmond Ingelthorpe, was 33 and her mother, Lady Joyce Tibetot, was 12. She married Sir John Neville on 25 April 1457, in Canterbury, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 May 1476, in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Ingoldesthorpe est née environ 1441, à Borough Green, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Edmond Ingelthorpe, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Joyce Tibetot, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Neville le 25 avril 1457, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mai 1476, à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Ingoldesthorpe um 1441 in Borough Green, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmond Ingelthorpe 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Joyce Tibetot 12. Sie hat am 25. April 1457 in Canterbury, Kent, England Sir John Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Mai 1476 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Ingoldesthorpe è nata il circa 1441 nel Borough Green, Kent, England, sua padre, Edmond Ingelthorpe, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Joyce Tibetot, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Neville il 25 aprile 1457, nel Canterbury, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1476, nel Bisham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Bisham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Ingoldesthorpeが約1441年にイギリスケントボロウ グレンで生まれた時，父Edmond Ingelthorpeは33歳，母Lady Joyce Tibetotは12歳であった。1457年4月25日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーでSir John Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年5月20日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアビシャムで36歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Ingoldesthorpe(이)가 대략 1441년 영국 켄트 버루 그린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmond Ingelthorpe(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joyce Tibetot(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1457년 4월 25일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 Sir John Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 5월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 비샤에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

mn.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: Salisbury, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Ingoldesthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1441, em Borough Green, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmond Ingelthorpe, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joyce Tibetot, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Neville em 25 de abril de 1457, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de maio de 1476, em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Ingoldesthorpe родилась около 1441 г. в местности бороую грин, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmond Ingelthorpe было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Joyce Tibetot, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Neville 25 апреля 1457 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 мая 1476 г. в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Ingoldesthorpe nació aproximadamente 1441, en Borough Green, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmond Ingelthorpe, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Joyce Tibetot, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Sir John Neville el 25 de abril de 1457, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1476, en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
